calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Counsil Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Pamela Underwood, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: People of the State of California.
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
